promptDescription: - **beeswarm** — one-dimensional scatter where each dot is an individual observation placed along a numeric x-axis and stacked vertically to avoid overlap; ideal for showing every data point in a distribution (unlike box/violin summaries). Use plain `data` for a single strip, optional `group` per point for color, or `strips` for multiple horizontal rows (one beeswarm per category). Set `"accurate":false` to use force layout instead of exact x positions. Spec: { "type":"beeswarm", "title":"...", "xLabel":"...", "xScale":[0,100], "data":[{"label":"Germany","value":12},{"label":"France","value":23,"group":"Europe"}], "strips":[{"label":"2023","data":[{"label":"A","value":12}]}] }
renderScript: function(wrap,spec){var C=['#534AB7','#7F77DD','#2E9CDB','#4BC1A8','#E8833A','#E85858','#9B59B6','#27AE60','#F39C12','#1ABC9C','#3498DB','#E74C3C','#2ECC71','#F1C40F','#8E44AD'];var T={text:'#1a1a18',text2:'#5a5a56',grid:'rgba(0,0,0,0.06)',hover:'#534AB7'};function load(url,g,cb){if(window[g]){cb();return;}for(var i=0;i1?strips.length*stripH+80:260))+'px';wrap.innerHTML='';wrap.style.position='relative';wrap.style.fontFamily='Segoe UI, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif';if(!strips.length||!strips.some(function(s){return s.data.length;})){wrap.textContent='No data';return;}strips.forEach(function(s){s.data.forEach(function(d){allVals.push(d.value);if(d.group&&groups.indexOf(d.group)<0)groups.push(d.group);});});xDom=spec.xScale&&spec.xScale!=='auto'?spec.xScale:d3.extent(allVals);if(!xDom||xDom[0]===xDom[1])xDom=[xDom[0]-1,xDom[0]+1];if(strips.some(function(s){return s.label;}))margin.left=80;colorFn=function(g){if(!groups.length)return spec.color||C[0];var idx=groups.indexOf(g),pal=spec.colors||C;return idx>=0?pal[idx%pal.length]:(spec.color||C[0]);};info=document.createElement('div');info.style.cssText='min-height:22px;font-size:12px;color:'+T.text2+';margin-bottom:4px';wrap.appendChild(info);legendEl=document.createElement('div');legendEl.style.cssText='margin-bottom:6px;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px';wrap.appendChild(legendEl);if(groups.length>1&&spec.showLegend!==false){groups.forEach(function(g){var item=document.createElement('span');item.style.cssText='display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;font-size:11px;color:'+T.text2;var sw=document.createElement('span');sw.style.cssText='width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%;background:'+colorFn(g);item.appendChild(sw);item.appendChild(document.createTextNode(g));legendEl.appendChild(item);});}else{legendEl.style.display='none';}svg=d3.select(wrap).append('svg').attr('width','100%');totalH=margin.top+margin.bottom+strips.length*stripH;svg.attr('height',totalH);renderChart=function(){svg.selectAll('*').remove();var w=wrap.clientWidth||600,width=w-margin.left-margin.right,x=d3.scaleLinear().domain(xDom).range([0,width]).nice(),g=svg.append('g').attr('transform','translate('+margin.left+','+margin.top+')');strips.forEach(function(strip,si){var cy=si*stripH+stripH/2,arranged=spec.accurate===false?arrangeForce(strip.data,function(v){return x(v);},dotR,cy):arrangeAccurate(strip.data,function(v){return x(v);},dotR,cy),cells,pts=arranged;if(strip.label){g.append('text').attr('x',-8).attr('y',cy+4).attr('text-anchor','end').attr('fill',T.text2).attr('font-size',11).text(strip.label);}cells=g.append('g').attr('class','cells');try{var delaunay=d3.Delaunay.from(pts,function(d){return d.x;},function(d){return d.y;}),vor=delaunay.voronoi([-margin.left,si*stripH,width+margin.right,(si+1)*stripH]);cells.selectAll('g.vcell').data(pts).enter().append('g').each(function(d,i){var cell=d3.select(this);cell.append('path').attr('d',vor.renderCell(i)).attr('fill','none').attr('pointer-events','all').on('mouseenter',function(){info.innerHTML=''+d.datum.label+': '+d3.format(',')(d.datum.value);d3.select(this.parentNode).select('circle').attr('opacity',0.75).attr('stroke',T.hover).attr('stroke-width',2);}).on('mouseleave',function(){info.textContent='';d3.select(this.parentNode).select('circle').attr('opacity',1).attr('stroke','none');});cell.append('circle').attr('r',dotR).attr('cx',d.x).attr('cy',d.y).attr('fill',colorFn(d.datum.group));});}catch(e){cells.selectAll('circle').data(pts).enter().append('circle').attr('r',dotR).attr('cx',function(d){return d.x;}).attr('cy',function(d){return d.y;}).attr('fill',function(d){return colorFn(d.datum.group);}).on('mouseenter',function(ev,d){info.innerHTML=''+d.datum.label+': '+d3.format(',')(d.datum.value);}).on('mouseleave',function(){info.textContent='';});}});var axisG=g.append('g').attr('transform','translate(0,'+(strips.length*stripH)+')').call(d3.axisBottom(x).ticks(6));axisG.selectAll('text').attr('fill',T.text2).attr('font-size',11);axisG.select('.domain').remove();axisG.selectAll('line').attr('stroke',T.grid);if(spec.xLabel){svg.append('text').attr('x',w-margin.right).attr('y',totalH-6).attr('text-anchor','end').attr('fill',T.text2).attr('font-size',11).text(spec.xLabel);}if(spec.title){svg.append('text').attr('x',w/2).attr('y',18).attr('text-anchor','middle').attr('fill',T.text).attr('font-size',13).attr('font-weight','500').text(spec.title);}};renderChart();if(window.ResizeObserver){ro=new ResizeObserver(function(){renderChart();});ro.observe(wrap);}else{window.addEventListener('resize',renderChart);}}if(window.d3)draw();else load('https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/d3@7/dist/d3.min.js','d3',draw);}
